reviews.review_title: Am I missing the other 3 songs?
reviews.review_description: I got the app and only saw 3 performances, but it says 6 songs. Please advise.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for your purchase. As described in the listing, the app features 3 experiences, each with 2 original songs. Hope you have been enjoying!

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers and performers of the fun videos,  I like it.
More please if possible.  Make this a dance along app to enjoy. More dance and dancing music please. Thanks

There isn't enough content to watch but then it's cheap and right price for this.
Are there plans to add more in the future because I want more.
